channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A timeline of the downfall of Sam Bankman-Fried and the colossal failure of FTX
item.description: Sam Bankman-Fried, the former CEO of the cryptocurrency exchange FTX was sentenced to 25 years in prison after being convicted of fraud for stealing at least $10 billion from customers and investors.
item.dc:creator: Sallee Ann Harrison, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Does your dog understand when you say 'fetch the ball'? A new study in Hungary says yes
item.description: A new study in Hungary shows that dogs, beyond being able to respond to commands like “sit” and “stay,” can learn to associate words with specific objects.
item.dc:creator: Justin Spike, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: JetBrains IntelliJ IDE to add K2 compiler mode
item.description: JetBrains’ IntelliJ IDEA 2024.1, a release of the integrated development environment (IDE) due on April 4, will feature an optional K2 compiler mode, enabling developers to use K2 for faster and more robust Kotlin code analysis, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Using Microsoft’s Retina to monitor Kubernetes networks
item.description: Kubernetes plays an important role at Microsoft. The container management system is a foundational piece of the company’s many clouds, from Microsoft 365 and Xbox, to Azure, to partners like OpenAI that use Microsoft’s Kubernetes to host their own services.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 5 easy ways to run an LLM locally
item.description: Chatbots like ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and phind can be quite helpful, but you might not always want your questions or sensitive data handled by an external application. That's especially true on platforms where your interactions may be reviewed by humans and otherwise used to help train future models.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Schools in the path of April's total solar eclipse prepare for a natural teaching moment
item.description: The total solar eclipse expected on April 8 already is inspiring school lessons in science, literacy and culture.
item.dc:creator: Carolyn Thompson, Associated Press, Local 4
